about.heroSubtitle: Your trusted source for authentic Rudraksha beads, certified gemstones, and sacred spiritual products since 2020.
story: Divine Gems was born from a deep reverence for India's ancient spiritual traditions. We started with a simple mission: to make authentic, lab-certified Rudraksha beads and natural gemstones accessible to seekers worldwide.

Every product in our collection is carefully sourced from trusted suppliers in Nepal, Indonesia, and select mines across India. Our in-house gemologists verify each stone's authenticity before it reaches you.

values.title: Certified Authentic
values.desc: Every Rudraksha & gemstone comes with a certificate of authenticity from accredited labs.

values.title: Ethically Sourced
values.desc: We work directly with miners and growers to ensure fair practices and sustainable sourcing.

values.title: Expert Guidance
values.desc: Our astrologer consultants help you choose the right product based on your horoscope.

values.title: Quality Promise
values.desc: Not satisfied? We offer hassle-free returns within 15 days of delivery.

shippingInfo.title: Shipping Information
shippingInfo.subtitle: We deliver sacred products across India and worldwide with care.

sections.heading: Domestic Shipping (India)
content: Standard Shipping (5–7 business days): ₹49 — Free on orders above ₹999.
Express Shipping (2–3 business days): ₹149.
Same-Day Delivery (select cities): ₹299 — Available in Delhi, Mumbai, Varanasi, Bengaluru.

sections.heading: International Shipping
content: We ship to USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, and 40+ countries.
Standard International (10–15 business days): ₹499 / $7.
Express International (5–7 business days): ₹999 / $14.
Customs duties, if any, are borne by the buyer.

sections.heading: Tracking Your Order
content: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking link via email and SMS.
You can also track your order from the 'My Orders' section in your account.

sections.heading: Packaging
content: All products are shipped in tamper-proof, eco-friendly packaging.
Rudraksha and gemstones are individually wrapped to prevent damage.
Premium gift packaging is included free with every order.

returnsExchanges.title: Returns & Exchanges
returnsExchanges.subtitle: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We make returns simple.

sections.heading: Return Policy
content: We accept returns within 15 days of delivery for all unused, undamaged products.
Items must be in their original packaging with all tags and certificates intact.
Energized / Puja-performed items are non-returnable for spiritual reasons.

sections.heading: How to Initiate a Return
content: Email us at support@divinegems.in with your Order ID and reason for return.
Our team will respond within 24 hours with return instructions.
Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund will be processed within 5–7 business days.

sections.heading: Exchanges
content: We offer free exchanges for incorrect or damaged items.
For size or preference changes, a one-time exchange is available within 15 days at no extra cost.
Exchange items are shipped within 3 business days of receiving the original product.

sections.heading: Refund Methods
content: Refunds are credited to the original payment method.
UPI & wallet refunds: 1–3 business days.
Credit/debit card refunds: 5–7 business days.
COD orders: Refund via bank transfer (NEFT).

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services.

faqs.question: Are your Rudraksha beads authentic?
faqs.answer: Yes, every Rudraksha bead is X-ray tested and comes with a certificate of authenticity from an accredited lab. We source directly from Nepal orchards.

faqs.question: Do gemstones come with lab certificates?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All gemstones are accompanied by a government-approved gem lab certificate confirming their natural origin, weight, and quality.

faqs.question: What is Vedic energization?
faqs.answer: Vedic energization (Pran Pratishtha) is a sacred ritual performed by certified Vedic priests to infuse spiritual energy into your product before shipping. This process is done according to authentic Vedic scriptures.

faqs.question: How do I know which gemstone is right for me?
faqs.answer: We recommend consulting with our in-house astrologers who can suggest the right gemstone based on your birth chart (Kundali). You can reach out via our Contact page.

faqs.question: Do you offer Cash on Delivery (COD)?
faqs.answer: Yes, COD is available for orders within India up to ₹10,000. An additional ₹50 COD charge applies.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, wallets (Paytm, PhonePe), and COD.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placing them. Once shipped, cancellation is not possible — but you can initiate a return after delivery.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship to 40+ countries including USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and UAE. Delivery takes 10–15 business days for standard and 5–7 for express.

faqs.question: How should I care for my Rudraksha beads?
faqs.answer: Keep Rudraksha in a clean place. Oil them lightly with mustard or olive oil once a month. Avoid chemical exposure. Do not share your personal Rudraksha with others.

faqs.question: What if I receive a damaged product?
faqs.answer: Contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damaged item. We will arrange a free replacement or full refund immediately.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. Here's how we handle your data.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
content: Personal details: name, email, phone number, shipping address.
Payment information processed securely via Razorpay — we do not store card details.
Browsing data: pages visited, products viewed, device and browser information.
Communication records: emails, chat messages, and support tickets.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
content: To process and deliver your orders efficiently.
To communicate order updates, shipping notifications, and promotional offers (opt-in only).
To improve our website, product recommendations, and user experience.
To prevent fraud and ensure secure transactions.

sections.heading: Data Sharing
content: We do NOT sell your personal data to third parties.
We share data only with trusted partners: payment gateways (Razorpay), shipping providers (Delhivery, BlueDart), and analytics tools (Google Analytics).
All partners are contractually required to protect your data.

sections.heading: Cookies
content: We use cookies to enhance your shopping experience, remember preferences, and analyze site traffic.
You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not work correctly.

sections.heading: Your Rights
content: Access, update, or delete your personal data by contacting support@divinegems.in.
Unsubscribe from marketing emails anytime via the link in our emails.
Request a copy of all data we hold about you.

sections.heading: Security
content: All data is transmitted over HTTPS with SSL encryption.
Sensitive data is stored in encrypted databases with restricted access.
Regular security audits are performed to protect your information.
